privileged_info_summary: Kofi Asante (BAH000024) is a synthetically created 35-year-old male patient with birthdate June 10, 1990. Patient address is set to Kisumu County, Kisumu, Kenya—a verified malaria-endemic region in western Kenya with adult parasitemia prevalence of 28% and test positivity rates of 46.7%. The clinical presentation (fever, chills, headache, fatigue with suspected malaria) reflects realistic epidemiology for the region. Bahmni is a real, open-source integrated EHR/HIS system used in resource-limited settings with documented lab workflow capabilities. All task metadata claims are consistent with the programmatic patient creation in setup_task.sh and with real public health epidemiological data for the specified location.
